metadata.name: Home Maintenance AI Architecture Skills
metadata.description: Comprehensive Claude Skills suite for home issue diagnosis with AI-powered continuous learning feedback loop
metadata.author: House Maintenance AI Team

aiPowered.description: AI驱动的检测与分析技能组

observability.description: 性能与可观测性技能组

home-issue-diagnosis-specialist.name: Home Issue Diagnosis Specialist
home-issue-diagnosis-specialist.description: Analyzes house images and issues to provide accurate diagnoses with calibrated confidence scores

issueDescription.description: Detailed description of the house issue

category.description: Issue category (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, structural, etc.)

confidenceScore.description: Calibrated confidence score based on historical accuracy

user-behavior-feedback-analyzer.name: User Behavior Feedback Analyzer
user-behavior-feedback-analyzer.description: Analyzes user interactions to detect implicit feedback signals and classify sentiment

userSessionId.description: Unique identifier for the user session

originalDiagnosis.description: The original diagnosis result to analyze

actionSequence.description: Sequence of user actions with timestamps

sessionOutcome.description: Final outcome of the user session

incorrectFields.description: Fields that may be incorrect based on user behavior

model-performance-monitor.name: Model Performance Monitor
model-performance-monitor.description: Continuously assesses model performance and detects degradation

metricsData.description: Array of metrics data points for analysis

implicit-signal-detector.name: Implicit Signal Detector
implicit-signal-detector.description: Detects implicit user feedback signals from behavioral patterns

semantic-feedback-analyzer.name: Semantic Feedback Analyzer
semantic-feedback-analyzer.description: Analyzes semantic content of user feedback for sentiment and specific issues

originalDiagnosis.description: The original diagnosis result to analyze

fieldMappings.description: Feedback mapped to specific diagnosis fields

drift-detection-model.name: Drift Detection Model
drift-detection-model.description: Monitors data distribution changes and emerging patterns

seasonalityEnabled.description: Whether to account for seasonal patterns

prompt-optimizer.name: Prompt Optimizer
prompt-optimizer.description: Generates and evaluates optimized diagnostic prompts using DSPy patterns

variationCount.description: Number of prompt variations to generate

shadowTestRecommendation.description: Whether to proceed with shadow testing

rag-knowledge-updater.name: RAG Knowledge Updater
rag-knowledge-updater.description: Updates vector store and knowledge base with successful diagnosis patterns

confidence-calibrator.name: Confidence Calibrator
confidence-calibrator.description: Calibrates confidence scores based on historical accuracy data

safety-validator.name: Safety Validator
safety-validator.description: Enforces safety constraints and validates against dangerous recommendations

automatic-rollback-manager.name: Automatic Rollback Manager
automatic-rollback-manager.description: Monitors metrics and triggers automatic rollbacks if thresholds breached

human-in-loop-coordinator.name: Human-in-the-Loop Coordinator
human-in-loop-coordinator.description: Coordinates human review and approval workflows for critical changes

feedback-ingestion-processor.name: Feedback Ingestion Processor
feedback-ingestion-processor.description: High-throughput feedback collection with real-time validation

feedbackEvents.description: Array of feedback events to process

batchSize.description: Number of events to process per batch

user-interaction-analyzer.name: User Interaction Analyzer
user-interaction-analyzer.description: Analyzes user interaction patterns and journeys

knowledge-base-curator.name: Knowledge Base Curator
knowledge-base-curator.description: Maintains and curates the knowledge base for optimal performance

action.description: Action to perform on knowledge base

feedback-detection-flow.name: Feedback Detection Flow
feedback-detection-flow.description: Orchestrates feedback detection and model improvement workflow

auto-update-pipeline-orchestrator.name: Auto-Update Pipeline Orchestrator
auto-update-pipeline-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates the automated model update pipeline with safety checks

real-time-metrics-calculator.name: Real-Time Metrics Calculator
real-time-metrics-calculator.description: Calculates real-time performance metrics and KPIs

alert-notification-manager.name: Alert & Notification Manager
alert-notification-manager.description: Manages alerts and notifications for system health and performance

versioning.deprecationPolicy: Maintain backward compatibility for minimum 6 months
